courses.title: Java Programming: Core + OOP
courses.description: Build a strong Java foundation: syntax, OOP, collections, and problem-solving with real exercises.

courses.title: Python for Beginners: From Zero to Confident
courses.description: Learn Python basics, functions, lists, dictionaries, and file handling with mini-projects.

courses.title: C Programming: Pointers and Memory
courses.description: Master the C fundamentals: variables, arrays, pointers, strings, and memory with hands-on labs.

courses.title: C++ Programming: OOP + STL Essentials
courses.description: Learn modern C++ with classes, templates, STL containers, and algorithmic thinking.

courses.title: JavaScript ES6+: The Modern Guide
courses.description: ES6+, async/await, DOM, modules, and patterns used in real-world JavaScript development.

courses.title: TypeScript Essentials for Frontend Developers
courses.description: Types, interfaces, generics, and practical patterns to ship safer JavaScript codebases.

courses.title: React Essentials: Components, State, and Hooks
courses.description: Build fast UIs with React: components, props, state, hooks, and routing basics.

courses.title: Node.js + Express: REST APIs from Scratch
courses.description: Design REST APIs, handle auth, validate inputs, and structure Node.js backends with Express.

courses.title: SQL for Developers: Queries and Joins
courses.description: Write SQL confidently: SELECT, WHERE, GROUP BY, JOINs, and common query patterns.

courses.title: HTML + CSS: Responsive Websites
courses.description: Create clean pages with HTML and modern CSS. Flexbox, Grid, and responsive patterns included.
